name: Dead Silence - Echoes of the Damned
short_description: An atmospheric horror game with an open world and cinematic scenes. Explore the dark forest, search for items, read notes, perform rituals, and uncover a terrifying story. A first-person experience filled with jumpscares and intense tension.
detailed_description:
Add the game to your wishlist in time to get it at a discount.

Immerse yourself in the terrifying world of psychological horror, where fear lurks in the shadow of every tree. Your journey begins in a mysterious, gloomy forest hiding dreadful secrets. You must explore its uncharted corners, search for hidden objects, read cryptic notes, and perform ancient rituals that will reveal the truth… or drag you into even greater horror.

This first-person game transports you into a cinematic world where every sound, shadow, or rustle sends chills down your spine. There is no room for coincidence – everything you find, every symbol, and every note is part of a grand story unfolding before you. The open world grants you the freedom to choose where to go and which mysteries to uncover first.

But remember: you are not alone in this forest. Something watches you. Something follows your every step, yet appears only when you least expect it. Jumpscares, unexpected encounters, and the constant feeling of a supernatural presence make the game truly tense and unpredictable.

Can you make it through, uncover all the fragmented pieces of the puzzle, and discover the truth? Or will this forest become your final resting place? Only the bravest will complete this scenario and escape the nightmare brought to life before their eyes.

Average playtime is 50 minutes.

Your opinion about the game is very important to us: your advice and suggestions. I look forward to your feedback, and I will implement the best of your ideas in the next update.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Ukrainian, Japanese, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
